extortion.description: www.venezuelare.com www.bancoactivo.com C.A. Reaseguradora Internacional de Venezuela (Venezuela Re) is a reinsurance company with over 50 years of experience in the insurance sector. The company focuses on providing professional services and support through its highly skilled technical, commercial, financial, technological, and legal teams. Venezuela Re aims to contribute to the economic and social progress of the country while being committed to risk management and regulatory compliance. Its mission is to achieve stability, solidity, and transparency in the insurance sector, aspiring to be the leading reinsurer in Venezuela with international participation . Una institución bancaria que se mueve a la misma velocidad del trabajo diario de sus clientes, dándoles soluciones financieras ágiles y competitivas, con menos trámites y una atención personalizada. Banco Activo
